purpose: Approval-first art generation jobs before any bulk scene regeneration.

providers.productionNotes: Best fit for anchor images, character sheets, scene drafts, cover concepts, and edit passes.
Useful commercial-safety-oriented option for image concepts and production art exploration.
Required path for commissioned reviewed/final production art.

jobs.reviewerNotes: Approved for product mood iteration: premium indigo night, moon jar motif, Korean mountain/cottage atmosphere, safe margins. No final status; needs human creative review before store use.
jobs.prompt: Global Moon Jar Stories style bible: Premium Korean children's picture-book illustration in watercolor, gouache, and soft ink, visible hanji paper grain, warm lantern light, deep indigo night, moon ivory, persimmon, jade leaf, lotus pink, and muted gold. One cinematic full-screen scene per page, calm bedtime-safe motion design, clear character silhouettes for ages 3-8, culturally respectful Korean settings and clothing. Illustrate 해님 달님 / The Sun and the Moon as a premium Korean watercolor, gouache, and soft ink picture book with hanji texture, warm lantern light, deep indigo, moon ivory, persimmon, jade, lotus pink, and muted gold. The product is bedtime-safe for ages 3-8, but this folktale still has suspense: the tiger should feel cunning, hungry, watchful, and dangerous through shadow, eye direction, posture, distance, and framing, never through gore or horror. Book character bible: Global style bible shared-content/style/moonjar_style_bible.json. Reference character bible shared-content/characters/sun_moon.character_bible.json. Maintain exact character designs, outfit colors, recurring objects, child-safe suspense, and scene continuity for The Sun and the Moon. The tiger is a deceptive folktale antagonist: cunning, hungry, watchful, mature, dangerous, and restrained. Use narrowed amber eyes, shadowed brow, longer angular muzzle, lowered head, tense shoulders, deliberate paw placement, and framing shadows to create tension. Keep everything child-safe with no gore, horror, teeth/claw emphasis, or graphic violence. Approval asset: app_hero_style. Scene direction: A cinematic app hero/banner style image for Moon Jar Stories, moon jar, Korean mountain night, warm cottage window, subtle story magic, no characters cropped.. Validate overall product mood before any bulk scene work. Requirements: premium Korean watercolor, gouache, soft ink, hanji texture, warm lantern light, deep indigo and moon ivory atmosphere, child-safe ages 3-8, no text or letters in image, no watermark, generous safe margins around faces and full bodies, subject not cropped, review-ready composition. Negative prompt: photorealism, horror lighting, blood, gore, injury, dead parent imagery, sharp claws, teeth emphasis, snarling close-up, jump scare, weapons, modern architecture, modern logos, text, labels, watermark, signature, distorted hands, inconsistent outfits, adult-like children, plush toy tiger, cute mascot tiger, goofy tiger, friendly pet tiger, baby-like tiger face, oversized innocent eyes, round baby cheeks, tiny baby paws, stuffed-animal fur, comic grin, slapstick tiger, smiling companion tiger, cute sidekick energy, friendly companion framing, cropped face, cut-off ears, cut-off hands, text in image, watermark, logo, cropped face, cut-off hands, cut-off ears, overly cute plush tiger, goofy tiger, friendly companion tiger, horror, gore, blood, jump scare.
